capabilities_used.evidence: 2024-04-30 直接写道: "$BTC DAILY ... we now have a perfect theoretical bull flag on the daily"；附图也是标准旗杆后下倾通道。
同一条 2024-04-30 推文继续强调 "with a bounce right off of the 100 MA"；2026-01-31 又说 "$SOL Sitting on the WEEKLY 200 MA... I'm buying this"，明显把均线回踩当顺势买点。
2025-07-31: "How often have Bitcoin Bollinger Bands been this tight on the daily?"；配图就是日线布林带极窄收口，典型等待波动扩张。
2024-01-31: "$BTC 4-HOUR Bitcoin has bearish divergence with overbought RSI on the 4-hour chart"，这是非常明确的 RSI 顶背离用法。
2024-09-30: "Bitcoin officially made a higher high by closing above $65,000... Now we look for dips to buy as it potentially establishes another higher low"，典型 HH/HL 趋势框架。
他反复围绕关键均线做结构判断：2024-04-30 强调 100MA 反弹；2026-01-31 强调 SOL 在 WEEKLY 200MA；图表里也常把均线当趋势切换或支撑确认。
2024-04-30: "this is what you can expect from Bitcoin if the 'normal' halving ... cycle repeats"，明确用减半后阶段路径做预期框架。
同一条 2024-04-30 推文直接写 "and 4-year cycle repeats"，说明他把四年周期当中高层叙事模板。
2026-02-27: "U.S. SPOT $BTC ETFS SEE $1.1B INFLOWS IN 3 DAYS"；同日还写到 "ETF flows hit $258 million"，把 ETF 流入当需求强弱代理变量。
虽然他偏多，但不是盲目抄底。2025-02-28 在大跌后说 "Feels like some of us may have invested money we could not afford to lose"；更常见的是先等结构或关键位确认，而不是接瀑布刀。
2026-01-31 谈 XRP: "Easy to cut loose with ..."，明显强调失效位清晰的交易；这和他一贯偏好高赔率、好止损定义的 setup 一致。
2026-04-09 直接写 "Markets rally into the close Friday... $SPY gaps down Monday morning"，会用股市风险偏好环境辅助判断加密周末/隔夜风险。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sentiment Gauge Dislocation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use popular sentiment gauges like Fear & Greed as a contrary overlay; when the readout stays elevated or depressed despite visibly different price action, treat it as evidence the crowd metric is stale or misleading.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把大众情绪指标当作反向过滤器；当恐惧贪婪等读数与价格体感明显错位时，视为市场情绪度量滞后或失真，从而提高对反向交易/均值回归的关注。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-04-30: "There is NO way we are still at 'greed' lol." 配图是 Fear & Greed 仍显示 67 Greed，但他认为市场体感已不匹配。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: High-Timeframe Reversal Candle
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Focus on monthly or weekly candles that threaten to print a major reversal body/wick after an extended move; used as a narrative turning-point signal rather than a precise trigger.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 关注周线或月线在长趋势后即将形成的大级别反转实体或长影线，把它作为趋势拐点叙事信号，而不是精确入场信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-04-30: "$ETH MONTHLY Ethereum is about to print an epic reversal candle on the monthly chart."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Asymmetric Support-defined Trade
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 支撑定义清晰的不对称交易
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Enter near the last major support or a major moving average only when invalidation is obvious, because the setup offers unusually favorable reward relative to clearly limited downside.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 只在最后关键支撑或重要均线附近出手，前提是失效位非常清晰，这样才能获得显著偏斜的盈亏比。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-01-31: "$XRP ... at the last meaningful support ... best risk/reward ... Easy to cut loose"；同日对 SOL 也因 WEEKLY 200MA 支撑而买入。

personal_quirks.quote: It’s turn your brain off and do nothing season
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 当趋势和持仓状态都对自己有利时，最优动作往往是不乱操作。
他的底层世界观长期偏向法币贬值、加密资产升值，因此默认持有风险资产而不是现金。

personal_quirks.quote: The only thing that has changed for Bitcoin is the price.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 大跌未必改变基本 thesis，价格下跌本身不自动等于逻辑破坏。
反对高杠杆和情绪化追单，把不被清算视为生存第一原则。

personal_quirks.quote: 99% of BREAKING NEWS is neither breaking or news.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他做内容分发，但对新闻噪音保持高度怀疑，更偏向用结构和价格验证新闻。

unique_traits: 他不是纯图形派，也不是纯宏观派，而是把高周期技术结构、均线关键位、周期叙事和新闻流/ETF 流量揉在一起做 swing bias。与很多 TA 交易员不同，他公开表达强烈长期看多和逢跌偏买的世界观，同时又强调必须有清晰失效位，宁愿在关键支撑做高赔率试错，而不是在半空中接刀。另一个显著特点是内容创作者属性很强，常把图表、新闻和情绪指标转化成易传播的口号式判断。

high_conviction_phrases: best risk/reward you get on an asset
The only thing that has changed for Bitcoin is the price
low_conviction_phrases: if the "normal" halving and 4-year cycle repeats
If this last wick down was somehow the bottom
